anti_claim: Batch10 live source drift capsule verifies exact copied non-secret source modules and public drift-refresh behavior only. It does not authorize live source mutation, Work Ledger mutation, mission landing, route selection, private-root equivalence, publication, or release.

allowed_public_inputs: exact copied non-secret macro control-plane modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
stable negative-case ids and validator verdicts

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A receipt-only drift-refresh claim, live Work Ledger mutation, private source dump, route-selection authority claim, mission-landing authority claim, or source-body copy without digest equality and negative cases.
failure_modes: source module digest drifts from the macro source without a refreshed copied body and manifest
copied source module lacks required anchors for option-surface routing, mission-transaction landing preflight, work landing, or Work Ledger control
refresh helper claims live source mutation or Work Ledger mutation authority instead of exact-copy drift inspection
validator accepts a stale digest replay as current body evidence
validator bypasses Python compile checks over copied modules
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, private runtime state, provider payload bodies, credentials, or live ledger state
capsule is treated as route-selection, mission-landing, publication, release, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe exact-copy drift-refresh capsule for four non-secret control-plane bodies: standard option-surface routing, mission-transaction landing preflight, durable work landing, and Work Ledger control.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun live-source drift evidence for real control-plane mechanics without granting live mutation, ledger, route, mission, publication, release, or private-root authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly four copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
execute the public drift-refresh exercise without mutating live source or live Work Ledger state
require stable negative-case codes for stale digest replay, compile bypass, private runtime export, and live mutation-authority overclaim

keep provider dispatch, browser/HUD authority, live route selection, live mission transaction, live Work Ledger authority, source mutation, publication, release, private-root equivalence, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 10 Live Source Drift capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 10 Live Source Drift capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch10_live_source_drift_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch10 live source drift capsule verifies exact copied non-secret source modules and public drift-refresh behavior only. It does not authorize live source mutation, Work Ledger mutation, mission landing, route selection, private-root equivalence, publication, or release.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, public_private_boundary, and anti-claim floor.
